occurrence_sentence: University of Maryland's Quantum Alliance Sets Mission to Make a Quantum-Ready Society
source_actor_key: university of maryland s quantum alliance

interaction_phrase: announced the creation of a quantum alliance
occurrence_sentence: University of Maryland, a top quantum research university, announced the creation of a quantum alliance.

Leaders from the University of Maryland, the state of Maryland and other partners gathered yesterday in Annapolis to launch an alliance designed to push innovations from quantum science and engineering into the mainstream and further enhance the region's primacy in a field that promises to revolutionize society, according to a [university news release](https://research.umd.edu/news/news_story.php?id=12815).

interaction_phrase: the alliance builds on existing assets at UMD
occurrence_sentence: The alliance builds on existing assets at UMD, which is already a hub for quantum science and technology and boasts five collaborative quantum research centers: The [Joint Quantum Institute](https://jqi.umd.edu/) and [Joint Center for Quantum Information and Computer Science](https://quics.umd.edu/)—collaborations with the National Institute of Standards and Technology; the [Quantum Technology Center](https://umdrightnow.umd.edu/news/university-maryland-launches-quantum-technology-center); the [Quantum Materials Center](https://qmc.umd.edu/); and the [Condensed Matter Theory Center](https://www.physics.umd.edu/cmtc/).
University of Maryland announces quantum alliance.
